forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the Barossa Valley in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
High

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast at night. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon then tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds near the eastern border. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with damaging winds in the east. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds from the late morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the early morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Nullarbor. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the west coast, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 24.
Moderate
Mostly sunny. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds south of Leigh Creek. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 33.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
